title: Green Eyes
description: Makes Copper Golems emit green light instead of yellow, matching other oxidized copper light sources.
body:
**Green Eyes — Resourcepack**

Bring visual consistency to your world!
This resource pack changes the Copper Golem’s eye glow from yellow to green, matching the color of other copper-based light sources such as Copper Torches and Copper Lanterns.

Perfect for players who prefer cohesive lighting and subtle aesthetic improvements.


Please join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XRuZTuFFHR) if you have suggestions what _You_ want or found any Issues.
